name: Dodge Action
description: Add Tier to Avoidance for one turn

name: Brace Action
description: Add Tier to Durability for one turn

name: Fortify Action
description: Add Tier to all Resistances for one turn

name: Aim Action
description: Add Tier to next Accuracy Check

name: Empower Action
description: Add Tier to next Damage Roll

name: Refine Action
description: Add Tier to next Condition Check

name: Assist Action
description: Give ally Tier bonus to their next roll
